com.nib.supernaut.commands.ReceiveCommandFlags

Packages that use ReceiveCommandFlags
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal
JSON terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.tn3270
TN3270 terminal services

    SupernautContext.receive(byte[] into, int intoOffset, int maxLength, ReceiveCommandFlags flags, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Receives data from the terminal into the specified byte array.
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.receiveMap(String mapset, String map, ITerminalInputStream its, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromLength, byte[] into, int intoOffset, ReceiveCommandFlags flags, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Receives a map from the terminal into the specified byte array.
